info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: ApyAyanaM vfdDiH ' iti kzIrasvAmI  ' pUrerApyAyanerTe syAt pUryate pUrayedapi ' (Slo. 150) iti devaH

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'kva gatimAnuzARAM ca Danuzo'sya prapUraRe' (rA॰1.67.20) prasajya Danuza AkarRakarzaRa ityarTaH
'ratnErDanESca paSuBiH sasyEScApi pfTagviDEH nagaraM vizayaScAsya pratipUrRastadA'Bavat' (BA0 anu0 215).. pratiranarTakaH pUrRa ityevArTaH
'na talloke dravyamasti yallokaM pratipUrayet samudrakalpaH puruzo na kadAcana pUryate' (BA0 anu0 9346).. pUrvavAkye pratiSabdaH SrUyate uttarasmiMSca tadaBAvaH samAnaScArTaH tena pratiSabdo'narTakaH
'sarvamalajjAkaramiha yadyat kurvanti paripUrRAH' (paYcata0 510) paripUrRA atyantaM samarTAH
